programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose's daughter and Dorothy's son visit their mothers at the same time.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose, Blanche and Dorothy take a vacation at a resort that doesn't live up to its reputation.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: While Dorothy is laid off from teaching, she finds work at the same museum where Blanche goes to work.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy and Blanche contrive an answer to Rose's personal ad.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Sophia takes action when a depressed, gun-toting Santa Claus threatens to ruin Christmas for her and her housemates.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche has trouble dealing with her father's plan to marry a much younger woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose's daughter and Dorothy's son visit their mothers at the same time.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy catches a friend stealing chickens, then learns that the man who was robbed has been shot.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The family prepares for the county fair; Olivia has a visit from her childhood sweetheart (Peter Donat), now wealthy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A teenage orphan who once stayed with the Waltons returns with news of a tryout with a professional baseball scout.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Dr. Jack Morgan returns to Houston with the intention of resuming his romance with Reba, despite the fact that he is still married.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba advises Van to treat Cheyenne as an equal in the family budget, which prompts him to give her an allowance.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: In an effort to save Brock and Barbra Jean from losing their home, Reba and Van buy their house and rent it out to them.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: After the family makes fun of Reba's poor eyesight, she secretly gets laser eye surgery, which leaves her temporarily blind.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: A court-mandated anger-management session goes from bad to worse for Reba, Brock, Van and Cheyenne when Barbara Jean joins the fray.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: A physical reveals that Reba has high blood pressure; Van asks for Brock's advice on anniversary gifts.

programme.title: Bridal Wave
programme.desc: A woman planning for her wedding at a resort meets a charming local right before the ceremony and has to choose between the man who can care for her financially or the man who truly understands her.

programme.title: Date With Love
programme.desc: A boy from a small town takes a big shot and asks his celebrity crush to prom on video. She says yes after the video goes viral, but things get a bit complicated when she realizes she might be falling for the boy's teacher.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Appetite for Love
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a woman (Taylor Cole) returns to her hometown in Tennessee to convince her stubborn ex-boyfriend (Andrew W. Walker) to sell his restaurant.

programme.title: Sweet Autumn
programme.desc: Aunt Dee splits her candy shop between her niece Maggie and maple farmer Dex. Following letters Dee left, the two uncover the reason for her decision during the Sweet Autumn festival.

programme.title: The 27-Hour Day
programme.desc: Taking a break from her wellness empire, an entrepreneur develops a budding romance with a handsome man at a relaxing retreat.

programme.title: The Reluctant Royal
programme.desc: Philadelphia mechanic Johnny learns his estranged father is a duke. The duke surprises him, as do his feelings for advisor Prudence.

programme.title: Kentucky Roses
programme.desc: A greenhouse worker and the son of Churchill Downs' CEO form an unlikely pair, coming together to save the Kentucky Derby rose blanket and uncovering a generational love story along the way.

programme.title: To Philly with Love
programme.desc: A teacher and an archivist decode Revolutionary War-era love letters, taking them on a thrilling journey through Philadelphia where they uncover history and discover a love story of their own. Stars Rebecca Dalton, Stephen Huszar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: For Sophia's birthday, Dorothy flies her sister Angela in from Sicily, Italy, as a surprise; Dorothy's the one who's surprised when Sophia's reaction is that of disgust.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: The Stan Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Dorothy feels sympathy for Stan when he tells her he's going to have open heart surgery; however, that sympathy fades when she learns of his many infidelities while they were married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The roommates swoon over a TV actor Patrick Vaughn who is appearing at their community theater.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose becomes convinced she is dead after suffering an esophageal spasm; after this experience she decides to live for the day.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy and Rose agree to baby-sit a group of children, but one set of parents fails to claim its child.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: For Sophia's birthday, Dorothy flies her sister Angela in from Sicily, Italy, as a surprise; Dorothy's the one who's surprised when Sophia's reaction is that of disgust.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: The Stan Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Dorothy feels sympathy for Stan when he tells her he's going to have open heart surgery; however, that sympathy fades when she learns of his many infidelities while they were married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The roommates swoon over a TV actor Patrick Vaughn who is appearing at their community theater.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose becomes convinced she is dead after suffering an esophageal spasm; after this experience she decides to live for the day.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy and Rose agree to baby-sit a group of children, but one set of parents fails to claim its child.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: A court-mandated anger-management session goes from bad to worse for Reba, Brock, Van and Cheyenne when Barbara Jean joins the fray.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: A physical reveals that Reba has high blood pressure; Van asks for Brock's advice on anniversary gifts.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba and Barbra Jean overwhelm Cheyenne with advice when she plans her second wedding to Van; Cheyenne tries to call off the wedding.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba is rushed to the hospital after collapsing at Van and Cheyenne's non-wedding; Van and Cheyenne question their marriage.

programme.title: Season for Love
programme.desc: After her divorce, a woman returns to her hometown to spend the summer with her daughter and mother. At her daughter's urging, she signs up for the town's annual barbecue competition, where she runs into her high school sweetheart. Old feelings resurface as they spend time together, but she convinces herself that she has no time for distractions when there's a competition to win.

programme.title: The Irresistible Blueberry Farm
programme.desc: A woman tries to fulfill her grandmother's dying wish by delivering a strange letter.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Two for Tee
programme.desc: Tee is a Chinese American pottery artist who meets new community center handyman Will. As she learns about her family's traditions through art, can she and Will save the center from closure?

programme.title: Right in Front of Me
programme.desc: A woman gets a second chance at romance with her college crush but isn't sure how to impress him until her new male friend gives her advice.

programme.title: Harvest Moon
programme.desc: After her family goes bankrupt, a city woman travels to the country to fix up a struggling pumpkin farm that her father bought as an investment.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Royal Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a princess and her bodyguard after her budding romance with an artist fizzles out.

programme.title: Kentucky Roses
programme.desc: A greenhouse worker and the son of Churchill Downs' CEO form an unlikely pair, coming together to save the Kentucky Derby rose blanket and uncovering a generational love story along the way.

programme.title: The Way Home
programme.desc: Kat and Elliot plan a romantic getaway, while Alice tries to gather more clues; Del and Sam get a surprise visit from Elliot's father, Vic.

programme.title: Autumn at Apple Hill
programme.desc: A woman inherits an inn from her grandparents.
